name: QuArch: A Benchmark for Evaluating LLM Reasoning in Computer Architecture
summary: arXiv:2510.22087v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The field of computer architecture, which bridges high-level software abstractions and low-level hardware implementations, remains absent f...
description: arXiv:2510.22087v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The field of computer architecture, which bridges high-level software abstractions and low-level hardware implementations, remains absent from current large language model (LLM) evaluations. To this end, we present QuArch (pronounced 'quark'), the first benchmark designed to facilitate the development and evaluation of LLM knowledge and...
author: Shvetank Prakash, Andrew Cheng, Mark Mazumder, Arya Tschand, Varun Gohil, Jeffrey Ma, Jason Yik, Zishen Wan, Jessica Quaye, Elisavet Lydia Alvanaki, Avinash Kumar, Chandrashis Mazumdar, Tuhin Khare, Alexander Ingare, Ikechukwu Uchendu, Radhika Ghosal, Abhishek Tyagi, Chenyu Wang, Andrea Mattia Garavagno, Sarah Gu, Alice Guo, Grace Hur, Luca P.
